feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HTML to PDF in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Would it be possible to convert HTML to PDF in SAP CPI?

Regards,

Naresh

entry.title: Removing NULL from SAP CPI mapping - context
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Please suggest how can I remove the NULL from the context ? tried couple of script but none working.

entry.title: Same Mapping Different WSDL
entry.content:
Dear Integration fellows,

I have developed an extension of IDoc and will upload it into CPI, so that the IDOC is getting recognized when sending over CPI. However, when replacing the old wsdl with the new in Graphical Mapping in CPI, all the mappings I have done are marked as deprecated and cannot be used. 

This means I have to do all the mapping from begining. Is there a way to avoid this and copy the mapping to the new wsdl structure?

entry.title: Delta loading in SAP CPI based on the ABAP CDS view
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I have an integration request that needs to send "new" information from our S/4 Hana to an external system, using SAP CPI as middleware.

My first idea was to ask the ABAP team to create an ODATA service pointing to the data I have to get and handle the deltas using a timestamp field. So, every time I query the service, I'll add a condition like $filter=DTField > [LastValueStored in CPI].

Even when this approach will meet our requirements, I've seen that CDS views can include an annotation called "Change Data Capture", that allows you to handle the delta loadings in a more "transparent" way.

I find a lot of articles about this feature, and how to use it, but no one using CPI. I mean, it's clear that there's not a "CDS sender adapter", but I couldn't find how to use an ODATA service, created from a CDS view with this annotation, that can be queried from CPI.

I found this article: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/delta-loading-in-sap-datasphere-based-on-the-abap-cds-view/ba-p/13575700 and in there is mentioned something " ODP framework". Is this something that can be used with CPI?

Any piece of information about this will be very welcomed.

Regards

Adrián

entry.title: Dynamic mapping of 3rd party applications with SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello Experts ;

I want to do a dynamic mapping between whatever 3rd party application and my backend SAP Business one and this dynamic mapping will map the fields of the 3rd party application (like Shopify,Magento ...) with the appropriate fields in SAP Business one.

I have to mention that whenever i want to change the third party application from one to another i don't have to create another mapping for it here is the dynamic aspect will reveal. I want to use SAP CPI for the integration process.

Any suggestion please ?

entry.title: The CPI URL is not showing any data
entry.content:
Hi,

I have consumed the Odata url in CPI iFlow. After successfully generating the CPI URL, I tested it via Postman with a particular date range. It gave a status code of 200, but I didn't get any response. This odata url has more than 80k records for a particular date range. If I test this odata url in the gateway client, it shows a status code of 200. Please help me.

entry.title: SAP Event Mesh Service Key Creation failed
entry.content:
Hi All,
Last week i created an SAP Event Mesh Instance based on this tutorial, https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-enterprisemessaging-instance-create.html.

To generate this instance i used the following JSON-File based on the service descriptor that SAP offers in the Help Section.

Instance Creation JSON:

Unfortunately when creating the OAuth2.0 service Keys (for AMQP / MQTT & HTTPREST) for external connection it didnt work out. 


the JSON I used:

The System tells me that he cannot find messaging and management.

Based on the tutorial and on this blog here I choose to leave all the placeholders as delivered from the Tutorial but it still doesnt work: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/service-key-creation-for-event-mesh/qaq-p/12527257  

Can anyone Help me with this Issue?

Thanks

entry.title: Best practice for converting FLAT file to XML in CPI
entry.content:
Hello, I'm a newc to this community, and I need to convert a flat file (like the example provided below) into XML format in CPI. I've found various blogs that suggest using Groovy scripts, while others recommend a combination of Palette functions and Groovy scripts. I'm unsure about the best practice to follow in CPI for handling this kind of scenario.

Looking for assistance from the community to meet this requirement using the best practices in CPI. Any assistance would be highly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Issue with CPI ODATA Query - filter !
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to extract the details by passing the following query to S4 but getting error as - "Left hand expression of memberaccess operator has wrong cardinality (to many not allowed)" in Odata service request. my filter expression looks like - $filter=to_Plant/Plant eq '08A' and ProductType eq 'MOH'.

From the note - 3008698 I got the issue but not sure how can I filter the plant . Please suggest

entry.title: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts of CPI,

I have a requirement of mapping and below is the requirement which i am unable to get the output, please review and provide the best CPI UDF solution

I used create copies udf but it is not creating as shown in target value needed

1 source context values should repeat again and again by given count value

Source single context values     context number of copies             Target Value Needed

101.22                                                   3                                             101.22

202.22                                                   2                                            202.22

303.22                                                   1                                            303.22

                                                                                                             ------------

                                                                                                             101.22

                                                                                                             202.22

                                                                                                             ------------

                                                                                                              101.22

entry.title: SAP MM
entry.content: How to write FS document in SAP and Please if someone has sample FSD share to this ***removed by moderation*** mail I'd.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
Hi Dinu,

Thank you for the reply,

When i tested with your code I am getting a different result, please see the screen shot

First context should repeat it self based on second input count number

if count value in second context is 1 then repeat 1 time

if count value in second context is 5 then repeat 5 times

if count value in second context is 3 then repeat 3 times

Thanks

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite "the page you are looking for is currently unavailable."
entry.content:
I am doing this training : Developing with SAP Integration Suite, using BTP Free Tier.

In lesson Creating an API when I test the API I get this response:

<h1>An error occurred.</h1> <p>Sorry, the page you are looking for is currently unavailable.<br/> Please try again later.</p>

It happen in Task 1: Create an API -> 4 Explore Resources View API -> step 5: Choose the Try out button. on Resources try out 

same as in step

Task 2: Test the API -> step 7: Now, choose the Send button on the bottom right of the screen.

Thank you.

entry.title: Need Help with CPI mapping
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need help/direction to achieve the following in SAP CPI Mapping.

In the Source <Item> node (Occurences 0...Unbounded) we have following segments at the same level

G_HL_gq_O
G_HL_gq_T
G_HL_gq_P
G_HL_gq_I

We have populated E1EDL24 for each G_HL_gq_O
Now , there is a field under //G_HL_gq_I/S_SN1/D_382 , we need to sum up all the values from //D-382 before the next G_HL_gq_O
and pass to target //E1EDL24/LFIMG .

Please suggest how can this be achieved.

entry.title: Need help with SAP CPI iflow
entry.content: Message mapping not returning expected response. The target response is not having items array.

entry.title: Binance Referral Code – 106896769 (Get $300 Sign-up Bonus)
entry.content:
Binance Futures Referral Code: 106896769- Users who are going to sign up through the mobile application can enjoy the highest commission fee discount by typing the 106896769 code into the referral ID section.

==>> Vissit Site

entry.title: Bybit-Empfehlungscode: 62545 (Fordern Sie einen kostenlosen Bybit-Anmeldebonus in Höhe von 30.000 $
entry.content:
Wenn Sie nach einer Krypto-Börse suchen, um Krypto schnell, sicher und benutzerfreundlich zu handeln, schauen Sie sich Bybit Exchange an, eine der besten Handelsplattformen für Krypto-Derivate weltweit. Und wenn Sie unseren speziellen Bybit-Promocode verwenden: 62545, können Sie bis zu 30.000 $ an Boni und Provisionen erhalten!

Was ist der Bybit-Empfehlungscode?
Der Bybit-Empfehlungscode ist ein Einladungscode, mit dem Sie der Bybit-Plattform für den Online-Handel mit Kryptowährungen beitreten und kostenlose Krypto-Anmeldeboni erhalten können. Der Code kann Ihnen verschiedene Vorteile wie Boni, Prämien und Rabatte verschaffen.

Sie können Bybit beitreten, indem Sie bei der Anmeldung den Empfehlungscode „62545“ verwenden. Mit diesem Code erhalten Sie einen Willkommensbonus von bis zu 30.000 USDT und 10 % Rabatt auf Ihre Handelsgebühren im ersten Monat.

Sie können auch mehr Prämien verdienen, indem Sie Ihren Code mit anderen teilen und Provisionen, Gutscheine und Mystery-Boxen erhalten. Der Promo-Code von Bybit ist eine großartige Möglichkeit, Ihr Krypto-Abenteuer mit einigen zusätzlichen Vorteilen zu beginnen und problemlos zu handeln.

Voraussetzungen für Bonusqualifikationen
Um sich für den Bybit-Anmeldebonus von 30.000 USDT zu qualifizieren, müssen mehrere Bedingungen erfüllt sein:

Um offiziell teilzunehmen, müssen sich Benutzer über den Empfehlungslink registrieren, eine Einzahlung tätigen und ihre Prämien über den Rewards Hub von Bybit einfordern.
Sie haben Anspruch auf dieses Angebot, wenn Sie über einen Empfehlungslink ein Bybit-Konto erstellen und Ihre erste Einzahlung tätigen.
Wenn Sie 250.000 USDT einzahlen und Trades im Wert von 150 Millionen USDT abschließen, können Sie als berechtigter empfohlener Benutzer einen gesamten Bonus von 30.000 USDT verdienen.
Nach Ablauf des dreitägigen Risikobewertungszeitraums werden berechtigten Benutzern im Rewards Hub automatisch Einzahlungsboni gutgeschrieben.
Benutzer müssen ihre Bybit-Boni manuell über den Rewards Hub anfordern.
Wenn Sie Ihre Einzahlungen innerhalb von drei Tagen nach Ablauf des 14-tägigen Einzahlungsberechnungszeitraums abheben, werden Sie vom Angebot ausgeschlossen.
Für das Handelsvolumen werden ausschließlich Derivatgeschäfte berücksichtigt. Einlagen in Fiat- und Spotgeschäften werden bei der Berechnung Ihres Handelsvolumens nicht berücksichtigt.
So beanspruchen Sie den Bonus mit dem Bybit-Empfehlungscode: 62545
Um einen Bonus mit dem Bybit-Empfehlungscode: 62545 zu erhalten, befolgen Sie diese Schritte:

Schritt 1: Registrieren Sie sich bei Bybit über den Empfehlungslink
Besuchen Sie die Bybit-Website oder die mobile App und klicken Sie auf „Registrieren“. Oder melden Sie sich über diesen [Bybit-Empfehlungslink] an. Geben Sie Ihre E-Mail-Adresse, Ihr Passwort und Ihren Empfehlungscode (62545) ein. Sie können statt E-Mail auch Ihre Handynummer verwenden. Stimmen Sie den Bedingungen und Datenschutzbestimmungen zu und klicken Sie auf „Anmelden“. Geben Sie den Code von Bybit ein, um Ihre E-Mail-Adresse oder Handynummer zu bestätigen.

Schritt 2: Machen Sie Ihre erste Krypto-Einzahlung
Klicken Sie nun oben auf „Assets“. Wählen Sie die Kryptowährung aus, die Sie einzahlen möchten, und klicken Sie auf „Einzahlen“. Sie sehen einen QR-Code und eine Adresse zum Senden von Geldern aus Ihrem Wallet.

Schritt 3: Fordern Sie Boni auf der Seite „Rewards Hub“ an
Klicken Sie nach der Einzahlung oben auf „Rewards Hub“. Sie werden verschiedene Aufgaben sehen, um Belohnungen zu erhalten, wie z. B. die erste Einzahlung zu tätigen, Take-Profit/Stop-Loss zu verwenden, USDT-Kontrakte zu handeln usw. Bei den Belohnungen handelt es sich um Boni und Coupons, mit denen Sie Gebühren und Verluste reduzieren können. Klicken Sie für jede erledigte Aufgabe auf „Anfordern“ und freuen Sie sich über Ihre Belohnungen.

entry.title: Código de referência Bybit: 62545 (solicite $ 30.000 de bônus de inscrição Bybit grátis)
entry.content:
Código de referência Bybit: 62545 (solicite $ 30.000 de bônus de inscrição Bybit grátis)
Se você está procurando uma troca de criptografia para negociar criptografia de forma rápida, segura e fácil de usar, dê uma olhada no Bybit Exchange, uma das principais plataformas de negociação de derivativos de criptografia do mundo. E se você usar nosso código promocional especial Bybit: 62545, você pode ganhar até US$ 30.000 em bônus e comissões!

Qual é o código de referência Bybit?
O código de referência Bybit é um código de convite que você pode usar para ingressar na plataforma Bybit para negociação de criptomoedas online e obter bônus de inscrição em criptografia gratuitos. O código pode oferecer vários benefícios, como bônus, recompensas e descontos.

Você pode ingressar no Bybit usando o código de referência “62545” ao se inscrever. Este código lhe dará um bônus de boas-vindas de até US$ 30.000 USDT e 10% de desconto em suas taxas de negociação no primeiro mês.

Você também pode ganhar mais recompensas compartilhando seu código com outras pessoas e recebendo comissões, cupons e caixas misteriosas. O código promocional Bybit é uma ótima maneira de começar sua aventura criptográfica com algumas vantagens extras e negociar com facilidade.

Requisitos para qualificações de bônus
Para se qualificar para o bônus de inscrição Bybit de 30.000 USDT, vários termos e condições devem ser atendidos:

Para participar oficialmente, os usuários devem se registrar usando o link de indicação, fazer um depósito e resgatar suas recompensas através do Rewards Hub da Bybit.
Você é elegível para esta oferta se criar uma conta Bybit usando um link de indicação e fizer seu depósito inicial.
Se você depositar 250.000 USDT e concluir negociações no valor de 150 milhões de USDT, poderá ganhar um bônus total de 30.000 USDT como usuário indicado elegível.
Os bônus de depósito serão concedidos automaticamente aos usuários elegíveis no Rewards Hub assim que o período de avaliação de risco de 3 dias terminar.
Os usuários precisarão reivindicar seus bônus Bybit manualmente no Rewards Hub.
Se você retirar qualquer um dos seus depósitos dentro de três dias após o período de cálculo do depósito de 14 dias, você será desqualificado da oferta.
Somente as negociações de derivativos serão consideradas para o volume negociado. Os depósitos em negociações fiduciárias e à vista não serão incluídos no cálculo do seu volume de negociação.
Como reivindicar bônus usando o código de referência Bybit: 62545
Para obter um bônus com o código de referência Bybit: 62545, siga estas etapas:

Etapa 1: registre-se no Bybit usando o link de referência
Visite o site ou aplicativo móvel da Bybit e clique em “Registrar”. Ou inscreva-se usando este [link de referência Bybit]. Digite seu e-mail, senha e código de referência (62545). Você também pode usar seu número de celular em vez de e-mail. Concorde com os termos e política de privacidade e clique em “Cadastre-se”. Digite o código da Bybit para verificar seu e-mail ou número de celular.

Etapa 2: faça seu primeiro depósito criptográfico
Agora, clique em “Ativos” na parte superior. Selecione a criptografia que deseja depositar e clique em “Depositar”. Você verá um código QR e um endereço para enviar fundos de sua carteira.

Etapa 3: reivindicar bônus na página “Rewards Hub”
Após depositar fundos, clique em “Rewards Hub” na parte superior. Você verá diferentes tarefas para obter recompensas, como fazer o primeiro depósito, usar takeprofit/stop loss, negociar contratos USDT, etc. As recompensas são bônus e cupons que você pode usar para reduzir taxas e perdas. Clique em “Reivindicar” para cada tarefa que você realizou e aproveite suas recompensas.

entry.title: SAP CPI Merge different payloads to single
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a scenario where I need to merge the response of api call to input payload.  Please  suggest how this can be achieved.

InputPayload (Json) -> convert to xml -> use message mapping to map the input payload fields to api fields -> trigger api call -> response returned is in xml format (add it to the InputPayload ??)

entry.title: java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream
entry.content:
Good day,

We have setup new integrations on Integration Suite which connect to Success Factors API via API Management.

We get the following error when the integration runs on schedule (intermittently):

java.io.IOException: Attempted read from closed stream

We are unable to pin point or reproduce the error in our QA environement.

Has anyone experienced or resolved this issue before?

Regards,

Brandon
